home.title: Özünlü Damper | Fast Production, Hardox Steel Superstructure Solutions – Since 1977
home.description: Since 1977, Turkey's trusted manufacturer of heavy commercial vehicle superstructures with Hardox-certified steel processing, advanced engineering and comprehensive after-sales service network.

damper.title: Özünlü Tipper | High-Performance Hardox Tipper Solutions – Since 1977
damper.description: Özünlü tipper models designed with Hardox steel bodies, advanced engineering and over 45 years of production experience — essential for construction, mining and infrastructure. Request a quote today.

yariRomork.title: Özünlü Semi-Trailer | Hardox Steel Tipper Trailer – Heavy-Duty Transport Solutions
yariRomork.description: Semi-trailer models with BPW and Özkoç axles and Hardox 450/500 bodies for safe, efficient heavy-load transport. Engineered by Özünlü.

ekEkipmanlar.title: Trailer Spare Parts & Equipment | Original Hydraulic, Axle, Brake Systems – Özünlü
ekEkipmanlar.description: Original trailer equipment and spare parts supply with Özünlü guarantee. Hydraulic systems, BPW-Özkoç axles, EBS brake kits and LED lighting — wide stock, fast delivery.

afterSales.title: Özünlü After-Sales Services | 24/7 Technical Support, Spare Parts, Authorized Service Network
afterSales.description: 87 authorized service points across Turkey, 24/7 technical support and original spare parts guarantee — Özünlü after-sales keeps your fleet running.

contact.title: Contact | Özünlü Damper – Quotes & Support
contact.description: Contact Özünlü Damper for sales, after-sales, export and HR. Head office: Sultangazi, Istanbul.

hero.subtitle: Fast production, long-lasting superstructure solutions and field-proven performance

about.title: Defining Strength Through Fast Production
about.paragraph1: Since 1977, we have delivered reliable, long-lasting superstructure solutions to diverse industries with production power extending from Turkey to the world.
about.paragraph2: We combine advanced engineering and design with the superior durability of steel, developing each product not just as a superstructure but as a solution that drives operational efficiency.

damperHero.description: Our tipper systems developed for tough field conditions deliver uninterrupted field performance with body durability, high tipping stability and fast unloading capacity.

trailerHero.description: Delivers transport efficiency, strong resale value and long-lasting performance.

equipmentHero.imageAlt: Özünlü Equipment and Spare Parts Solutions
equipmentHero.description: From hydraulic systems to EBS brake kits, premium axle brands to LED lighting — all trailer equipment is original certified and delivered fast from wide stock with Özünlü guarantee.

features.0: OEM-approved superstructure design — production compatible with different chassis and tractor configurations
features.1: certified steel processing and robotic welding technology
features.2: Full compliance with all legal requirements and European safety standards, led by ECE and EU regulations
features.4: 87 authorized service points in 50 provinces across Turkey
features.5: Structural design that preserves high resale value
features.6: Export to more than 50 countries — globally proven quality

mapPreview.title: Nationwide
mapPreview.description: Wherever your vehicle is, Özünlü is with you. Our 87 authorized service points in 50 provinces ensure uninterrupted fleet operations with original spare parts and certified technicians.

contactCta.title: Let's Find the Right Solution for Your Fleet Together
contactCta.description: With over 45 years of experience, we deliver tailored solutions for your tipper, semi-trailer and equipment needs.

hero.description: The engineering answer for tough sites. body, high tipping stability and optimized load capacity — superior performance in every condition.

products.title: Tipper
products.subtitle: Explore and request a quote now.

features.item01Content: Body structure made with Swedish steel redefines industry standards in wear and impact resistance. Long life, low maintenance cost.
features.item02Content: High-strength steel body and reinforced floor structure prevent deformation under the heaviest excavation conditions; high tipping stability ensures safe unloading.
features.item03Content: Lightweight high-strength chassis design delivers maximum transport capacity within legal load limits.

configurator.title: Request a Quote
configurator.subtitle: Specify technical details for a high-performance tipper tailored to your needs. Our expert team will prepare your custom quote shortly.

hero.description: Lighten heavy transport with engineering. steel structure, advanced brake technology and optimized load distribution — superior performance and safety on every route.

products.title: Semi-Trailer
products.subtitle: Explore and request a quote now.

features.item01Content: High-strength chassis produced with robotic welding; maximum resistance to flex, minimized weight, maximized payload.
features.item02Content: While the EBS electronic braking system provides precise and balanced braking, the TPMS tire pressure monitoring system warns of potential risks in advance; driving assurance at European safety standards.
features.item03Content: High efficiency across different load types, from excavation and mining to aggregate transport; body options that adapt to the needs of every industry.

configurator.title: Request a Quote
configurator.subtitle: Share details to design the best high-performance semi-trailer for your fleet. Our engineering team will prepare a custom technical quote.
